overview: A pre-launch landing page for Froze, a behavioral savings app that locks funds until goals are reached, with a waitlist signup, detailed feature highlights, and a product preview.
features: Waitlist signup form positioned right under the tagline
Detailed feature highlights for lockable accounts, automated savings, smart insights, and reminders
Frosted glass product mockup previewing the upcoming vault dashboard
Lightened icy background with frosted glass motifs throughout
Admin route for viewing waitlist signups
